modules.title: Open your Grow bonus
modules.html:
Bonus course · included with your membership

Grow — the Type 4 growth & retention course

A complete, standalone course we've unlocked for you as a member — the length-retention system for kinky, coily & curly crowns.

  • 15 lessons across 3 modules — how Type 4 hair really grows, the growth mindset, and the practical system.
  • The 90-Day Crown Challenge — a day-by-day plan to build the habit.
  • 15 DIY growth treatments — the Recipe Lab, with porosity notes.
  • Module exams + a completion certificate — learn it, prove it, own it.
Open the Grow course →
Tip It opens in a new tab and saves your progress there. Come back any time — mark this lesson as read to keep your Studio streak.
